symptoms.symptom_name: Atypical sharp, brief, localised, non-exertional left-sided chest pain (no arm/jaw radiation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Atypical non-anginal sharp brief chest pain is part of the MVP symptom cluster.
Sharp, brief, non-exertional pain without arm/jaw radiation is not an anginal/ischaemic pattern.
Palpitations/awareness of heartbeat are part of the MVP autonomic symptom cluster.

symptoms.symptom_name: No syncope, no severe dyspnoea, no central crushing exertional pain (no ACS red flags)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of ACS red flags and syncope supports a benign cause suitable for community management.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fatigue and mild anxiety/panic-like symptoms; high health anxiety

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fatigue and anxiety/panic-like symptoms accompany MVP syndrome and are amplified by health anxiety.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dynamic mid-systolic click with a late systolic murmur (moving earlier/lengthening on standing)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A dynamic mid-systolic click with a late systolic murmur that changes with standing is characteristic of MVP.

investigation_details.expected_result: Systolic displacement/prolapse of a mitral leaflet with little or no significant regurgitation, confirming benign MVP
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Not urgent; a routine echocardiogram documents the prolapse and baseline regurgitation for future surveillance.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Atypical sharp brief non-exertional chest pain with palpitations, fatigue and anxiety, and no ACS red flags, with a (sealed) dynamic click/murmur, indicates benign MVP syndrome warranting reassurance and routine follow-up rather than emergency assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine in-person auscultation and baseline 12-lead ECG (via GP)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the dynamic click/murmur and provides a baseline ECG; appropriate and non-urgent.
Documents the degree of prolapse/regurgitation for reassurance and future surveillance; not urgent.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency cardiac work-up / overnight ED troponin series
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Unnecessary over-triage for a benign non-anginal presentation without red flags in a young adult.
